sql:
SELECT
data_sibay.tahun,
ceklis.nama_madrasah,
ceklis.npsn,
COUNT(data_sibay.npsn<>"") AS jumlah_siswa,
SUM(data_sibay.file_scan<>"") AS jumlah_upload,
(COUNT(data_sibay.npsn<>""))-(SUM(data_sibay.file_scan<>"")) AS selisih,
ceklis.ceklis_proses,
ceklis.ceklis_berkas,
ceklis.catatan
FROM ceklis
LEFT OUTER JOIN data_sibay ON ceklis.npsn = data_sibay.npsn 
where data_sibay.tahun = YEAR(CURDATE())
GROUP BY ceklis.npsn
name: ceklis_proses
